title: Methods should not be hard to maintain
messageFormat: Method '{0}' has a cyclomatic complexity of {1}, above the limit of {2}.
summary: Cyclomatic complexity counts the independent paths through a method by adding one for each branch point such as an if, loop, case, catch, conditional operator, or short-circuit boolean. A high count means more paths to understand and to cover with tests, and is a strong predictor of defects.
